reason: Verify local-only identity/settings terminology and no account or cloud scope drift.
Verify Wails window and WebView2 changes remain inside desktop shell ownership.
Verify no Go audio stack is introduced and unsupported output selection falls back explicitly.
Verify saved device preferences remain local and schema-compatible.
Verify light visual system, compact desktop layout, and responsive accessibility.
Verify device IDs and settings contracts retain one owner.
Verify device state, persistence, generated binding, and UI feedback flow correctly.
Review each task acceptance criterion and exclusion.
Review declared WebView, window, optional runtime asset, and rollback decisions.
